MODULE: cosmos.integration.chain_memory.memory_manager
FILE: cosmos/integration/chain_memory/memory_manager.py (686 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: Chain Memory Manager - High-level API for on-chain memory storage.

Provides a simple interface for:
- Pushing bot memory to Monad blockchain
- Pulling and reconstructing memory from chain
- Loading memory into Cosmos/HermesAgent bots

REQUIREMENTS:
- Must hold 100,000+ COSMOS tokens to use push fea

CLASSES:
- MemoryRecord: Record of a memory stored on-chain.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> Dict
  Methods: def from_dict(cls, data: Dict) -> 'MemoryRecord'
- ChainMemory: Main interface for on-chain memory storage.

Usage:
    cm = ChainMemory(wallet_
  Methods: async def verify_cosmos(self) -> Dict
  Methods: def uploader(self) -> ChainUploader
  Methods: def downloader(self) -> ChainDownloader
  Methods: def wallet_address(self) -> Optional[str]
  Methods: def estimate_push_cost(self, memory_path: Optional[str]=None) -> Dict
  Methods: async def push_memory(self, title: str='Bot Memory', memory_path: Optional[str]=None, on_progress: O
  Methods: async def pull_memory(self, tx_ids: Optional[List[str]]=None, memory_id: Optional[str]=None, output_
  Methods: async def pull_all_memories(self, wallet_address: Optional[str]=None, on_progress: Optional[Callable
